flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 33% at Oklahoma Wesleyan University vs the 2003–2007 baseline (663 vs 986).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Oklahoma Wesleyan University fell 31% between 2021 and 2024 (30.2% → 20.9%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Oklahoma Wesleyan University rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($29.5k → $33.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Oklahoma Wesleyan University rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($29.5k → $33.5k).
